About Me

Get to know the person behind these pixels.

About Me

Hi, I'm Creative Developer

I'm a multidisciplinary developer with a background in both software development and graphic design. That combination shaped the way I build software — always focused on meeting core requirements while keeping the user experience at the center of every decision.

I've been passionate about games since I was 10, and that passion drives everything: from studying old console architectures to understand computing at its limits, to crafting immersive Games and Software solutions.

My Skills

Web Development
UI/UX Design
Game Development
Communication
🔍Reverse Engineering
⚙️C++
🎨Photoshop
🕹️Pixel Art

My Journey

From RPG Maker maps to municipal tech — a timeline of passion, persistence, and pixels.

ProjectAwardEducationCareer GapJobFreelanceContract
2006Project

First Steps in Game Dev

First experiences with game development using RPG Maker 2003 and RPG Maker XP (Ruby RGSS3).

2009Award

OBI — Brazilian Olympiad in Informatics

Ranked in the top 10% of scores nationwide.

2009Project

Dark Naruto Online

Built a fully custom Open Tibia server themed around the Naruto anime. Peak of 60 simultaneous players online. Original server files preserved to this day.

2010 – 2013Education

IFS — Instituto Federal de Sergipe

High School with Technical Degree in Systems Development — Integrated program (3/4 completed, incomplete).

2013 – 2016Education

Universidade Tiradentes (UNIT)

Bachelor's Degree in Graphic Design.

2013 – 2014Job

I2 Consult — Trainee Web Designer

Responsive design prototyping, branding, and front-end development with Bootstrap.

2015 – 2016Job

AvatarB2B — Trainee Web Designer

WordPress, PHP, responsive design prototyping, branding, and front-end development with Bootstrap.

2016Job

MA9 — Trainee Web Designer

Social media management, WordPress, PHP, responsive design prototyping, branding, and front-end development with Bootstrap.

2017Job

AvatarB2B — Contract Web Designer

Interactive website for "O Melhor Bolo do Mundo" — heavy JavaScript, branding, and advertising campaigns.

2018 – 2019Job

SETUR-SE — Web Designer

Lead developer for the "Sergipe Sinta de Perto" tourism project. Stack: PHP, WordPress, Bootstrap.

2020 – 2022Career Gap

Professional Tattoo Artist

Dedicated exclusively to a career as a professional tattoo artist.

2023 – 2024Education

Alura — Tech Extension Courses

One year of technology extension courses covering modern web development and software engineering.

2024Education

Universidade Tiradentes

Systems Analysis & Development — In Progress

2025Freelance

MazeOT

Reverse engineering for the creation of an Open Tibia automation bot.

2025Contract

Causso IT Solutions — Drakmora

Open Tibia server development using TFS/OTX. Stack: C++, Lua, MySQL, Pixel Art.

2026Freelance

Divine Gaming

Pixel art creation — props, characters, and items.

2026Job

Prefeitura Municipal de Aracaju — Current

Developer and UI/UX Prototype Designer for municipal technology initiatives.
